Andhra University centenary valedictory on April 27 with VP and CM expected to attend
articles.description: Andhra University centenary valedictory on April 27 at AU Engineering College grounds; 25,000 expected to attend

articles.title: Spirit Airlines faces shutdown amid ongoing war in Iran? Here's what report suggests
articles.description: Spirit Airlines, a major budget-friendly carrier in the US, is reportedly going to stop operations as early as today, a move that could leave travellers stranded, CBS News reported.

articles.title: Leak on pipeline at Vazhuthacaud plugged, says Kerala Water Authority
articles.description: KWA officials say the contractor for the Smart City projects carried out the repair; the pipeline sprang a leak near the City Police Commissioner’s office around 10 p.m. on April 13

topStories.title: Spirit Airlines faces shutdown amid ongoing war in Iran? Here's what report suggests
topStories.description: Spirit Airlines, a major budget-friendly carrier in the US, is reportedly going to stop operations as early as today, a move that could leave travellers stranded, CBS News reported.

topStories.title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni gets life sentence in BJP leader Yogesh Gowda murder case
topStories.description: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni gets life imprisonment in BJP leader Yogesh Gowda murder case

topStories.title: Could the Lebanon ceasefire lead to US-Iran talks breakthrough?
topStories.description: Al Jazeera's Tohid Asadi discusses the prospect that the ceasefire in Lebanon could lead to a US-Iran peace deal.

topStories.title: Quote of the day: Donald Trump on mental toughness—‘What separates the winners from the losers is how a person reacts…’
topStories.description: Donald Trump highlights that success depends on how we respond to setbacks. His quote stresses resilience, adaptability, and mindset. Challenges are inevitable, but winners grow from them, using obstacles as opportunities to adjust, learn, and move forward stronger.

topStories.title: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni sentenced to life imprisonment for murdering BJP leader in Dharwad in 2016
topStories.description: Vinay Kulkarni, elected to the Legislative Assembly from the Dharwad constituency, was named as prime accused in the murder of Yogeshgouda Goudar, a 26-year-old BJP zilla panchayat member, in Dharwad in 2016

topStories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump announced the 10-day ceasefire between the two countries.

topStories.title: ‘Closely following situation in West Asia ', says MEA on Pak's role in ceasefire
topStories.description: In a weekly media briefing, Jaiswal was responding to a question on Pakistan's role in ensuring the US–Iran ceasefire.

topStories.title: Supreme Court rejects Pawan Khera's plea to extend transit bail, asks Assam Court to decide case independently
topStories.description: The SC also clarified that neither the High Court order which granted Khera relief not the apex court order which stayed the relief shall come in the way of a court in Assam which would hear and decide the matter

topStories.title: BBC in Iran: 'Tehran does not think it has lost this war'
topStories.description: Lyse Doucet says Iranians want a solution to the long-running animosity with the US, but leaders is not willing to make a deal on Washington's terms.

topStories.title: US-Iran war impact: West Asia may take up to 2 years to restore lost energy production, says IEA
topStories.description: Energy production in West Asia may take two years to recover post-conflict, varying by country, according to the IEA. The US and UK are discussing maritime security in the Strait of Hormuz, while a ceasefire with Iran may expire on April 22.

topStories.title: PM Modi's appeal for vote on women's quota amid questions over delimitation link
topStories.description: Congress-led Opposition has said a biased delimitation law is being pushed through while using the women quota as smokescreen.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Maya Angelou: 'I don't trust people who don't love themselves and tell me ‘I love you’…'
topStories.description: Maya Angelou was a prolific American writer and civil rights activist, known for her seven autobiographies and powerful poetry.

dailyNews.title: Lorne Michaels’ ‘SNL’ grip on cast exposed in new documentary
dailyNews.description: Morgan Neville says his "SNL" documentary reveals how Lorne Michaels feels "beleaguered" despite being seen as comedy's ultimate gatekeeper for decades.

dailyNews.title: WWE star Chelsea Green should be WrestleMania 'headliner,' Alba Fyre says
dailyNews.description: WWE star Chelsea Green misses WrestleMania for a third straight year after an ankle injury sidelined the first-ever women's United States champion.

dailyNews.title: Influencer’s safari getaway turns deadly days after proposal as police question fiancé, family demands answers
dailyNews.description: Influencer Ashly Robinson, also known as Ashlee Jenae, died in Zanzibar after a reported misunderstanding with her fiancé, authorities say in probe.

dailyNews.title: Doctors in training learn cooking skills to help patients amid America's chronic disease crisis
dailyNews.description: Future doctors are learning to prepare healthy, flavorful meals and turn nutrition advice into patient guidance in new culinary medicine programs at medical schools.

dailyNews.title: Multiple researchers with top security clearances gone without a trace and more top headlines
dailyNews.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.

dailyNews.title: Minnesota Republicans reveal which far-left candidate they want to challenge in open Senate race
dailyNews.description: GOP strategists say a Peggy Flanagan win in Minnesota's Democratic Senate primary would boost Republican chances to capture a Senate seat in the 2026 general election.

dailyNews.title: Florida officials warned to avoid reparations-style effort as state gears up to restrict DEI even further
dailyNews.description: Leon County, Florida risked losing $16.8 million in grants by pursuing a historical harms measure, according to county staff warning about anti-DEI law SB1134 compliance.

dailyNews.title: Charlie Kirk podcast pans Utah Valley University citing 'safety concerns' in scrapping controversial speaker
dailyNews.description: "The Charlie Kirk Show" offered reaction to Utah Valley University canceling its commencement speaker Sharon McMahon after the selection sparked outrage.

dailyNews.title: WWE star Kit Wilson expresses support for Cody Rhodes after Pat McAfee promo, no animosity after 'toxic' move
dailyNews.description: Kit Wilson tells Fox News Digital he had "no idea" Cody Rhodes was coming but praised his message amid the Pat McAfee and WrestleMania 42 controversy.

dailyNews.title: Doctors warn of ‘looksmaxxing’ dangers after influencer’s livestream emergency
dailyNews.description: Doctors caution about "looksmaxxing" risks, from "softmaxxing" self-care to dangerous "hardmaxxing," after a content creator's reported livestream emergency.

dailyNews.title: Texas emerges as the top destination for companies leaving blue states
dailyNews.description: Texas ranks No. 1 in job creation and economic output growth, attracting major corporations like ExxonMobil and Chevron to relocate their headquarters.

dailyNews.title: Trump taps former deputy surgeon general to helm CDC
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced former deputy surgeon general Dr. Erica Schwartz as his nominee for Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) director.

topStories.title: GREGG JARRETT: Long-hidden documents reveal first Trump impeachment was a total fraud
topStories.description: Newly declassified documents show the first Trump impeachment was orchestrated fraud, DNI Tulsi Gabbard says, sending criminal referrals to the DOJ.

topStories.title: Lebanon Cease-Fire Leaves Netanyahu in an Uncomfortable Spot
topStories.description: Most Israelis wanted the fight against Hezbollah to continue. But Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s critics say he is showing that he cannot, or will not, stand up to President Trump.

topStories.title: The 27-Year-Old Diplomat Waging Trump’s Cultural War With Europe
topStories.description: Five years out of college, Samuel Samson has driven the Trump administration’s push to upend America’s postwar relationship with Europe.

topStories.title: Trump Tries to Stop Drug Smuggling From South America. Drug Smugglers Invent New Tactics.
topStories.description: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.

topStories.title: Trump to Pick Ousted FEMA Head to Lead Agency Again
topStories.description: Cameron Hamilton is a former Navy SEAL who ran unsuccessfully for Congress.

topStories.title: Hezbollah warns fingers remain on trigger, but Lebanon ceasefire holds
topStories.description: President Trump voices renewed optimism for a wider deal to end the Iran war as Hezbollah indicates it will abide by the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

topStories.title: Controversial surveillance program extended by House but only until April 30
topStories.description: The House OK'd a short-term renewal of a controversial surveillance program used by U.S. spy agencies, after Republicans revolted and refused President Trump's push for a longer extension.

topStories.title: Where Trump's goals in Iran stand at this point
topStories.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed that the war with Iran is "almost over." He has also stated multiple times that the U.S. is close to accomplishing "all of its goals" in Iran. CBS News' Robert Costa reports and Michael Doran, director of the Center for Peace and Security in the Middle East at the Hudson Institute, have more.

topStories.title: Trump continues feud with Pope Leo over war with Iran
topStories.description: Earlier this week, President Trump turned his criticism toward an unlikely subject- Pope Leo. Michael O'Loughlin, the executive editor of the National Catholic Reporter, joins "The Daily Report."

dailyNews.title: Israel and Lebanon Reach 10-Day Ceasefire, Paving Way for Deal
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire after six weeks of intense Israeli bombardment targeting what Israel says was the militant group Hezbollah. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Dr. Erica Schwartz, former deputy surgeon general, for CDC director
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced he was nominating Dr. Erica Schwartz to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.

dailyNews.title: U.S. tech companies ramp up government lobbying amid Iran war uncertainty
dailyNews.description: A White House spokesperson told CNBC the administration had been working with industry leaders to mitigate disruption brought about by the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

dailyNews.title: Trump nominates Erica Schwartz as CDC director amid turmoil around leadership, vaccine policy
dailyNews.description: The CDC has been going through turmoil and several leadership shakeups under HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

dailyNews.title: Trump says gas prices 'not very high' as most U.S. voters blame him for price spike
dailyNews.description: Trump touted the rising stock market as he brushed off concerns that Americans are laboring under higher gas prices as a result of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Spain touts energy resilience to Iran war as Trump tensions cast shadow over trade
dailyNews.description: The southern European country has ramped up its investment in solar and wind technologies in recent years.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Israel and Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire, President Trump says
dailyNews.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to a 10-day ceasefire beginning April 16, President Trump announced in a post on social media.
